questionHtml:
Toktam walks to work on mornings when her car does not start and it is not raining. Toktam takes a taxi to work on mornings when her car does not start and it is raining.

Where Toktam lives, there is a 45 % probability of rain on any given morning, independent of any other morning. The probability of Toktam’s car starting is independent of the weather.

Find the probability that Toktam’s car starts on exactly two mornings in a particular 5 day workweek.
markschemeHtml:
evidence of using binomial distribution                    (M1)

Note: Evidence is X~B5, 0.65 or binomial with n=5, p=0.65.

0.181 0.181146…                    A1

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find the probability that Toktam’s car starts on exactly two mornings in a particular 5 day workweek.
